title: Development of retirement complex in full swing
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The development of a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The development of a retirement complex at Adler's Nest, at Aalwyndal outside Mossel Bay, is in full swing.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The development of a retirement complex at Adler's Nest, at Aalwyndal outside Mossel Bay, is in full swing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Owner Hein Marx had to bring an application to the High Court in order to continue with the development. Fortunately, the construction of the retirement complex could go ahead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the past seven years, Adler's Nest, within the unspoilt natural beauty of Aalwyndal, has maintained an excellent reputation as a facility that, in addition to frail care, provides excellent medical care 24 hours a day.","html":"Over the past seven years, Adler's Nest, within the unspoilt natural beauty of Aalwyndal, has maintained an excellent reputation as a facility that, in addition to frail care, provides excellent medical care 24 hours a day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The new retirement section will consist of own title homes and share title apartments. There will also be a community centre that will have everything, including a shop and even a gym, where residents of the retirement complex can exercise.","html":"The new retirement section will consist of own title homes and share title apartments. There will also be a community centre that will have everything, including a shop and even a gym, where residents of the retirement complex can exercise."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, the complex will be pet friendly. Charges will be settled per person and not per unit.","html":"In addition, the complex will be pet friendly. Charges will be settled per person and not per unit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Marx says there will be 100 000 litres of water per day available to residents to wash vehicles and irrigate gardens, among other things. He notes: \"We will process sewage underground ourselves and therefore ensure enough water.\"","html":"Marx says there will be 100 000 litres of water per day available to residents to wash vehicles and irrigate gardens, among other things. He notes: \"We will process sewage underground ourselves and therefore ensure enough water.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to all the other benefits for homeowners, the retirement home is unique because it has the most beautiful view of the mountains and the sea.","html":"In addition to all the other benefits for homeowners, the retirement home is unique because it has the most beautiful view of the mountains and the sea."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Homes will be built of face brick so that the maintenance is as low as possible. Modern security will also be available to residents 24 hours a day and homeowners can spend their last years in a beautiful and affordable environment,\" Marx notes","html":"\"Homes will be built of face brick so that the maintenance is as low as possible. Modern security will also be available to residents 24 hours a day and homeowners can spend their last years in a beautiful and affordable environment,\" Marx notes"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"At Adler's Nest we offer a safety, peace and quiet. Our rules are not rigid, because we want the residents and any visitors to feel as at home as possible here,\" concludes Marx.","html":"\"At Adler's Nest we offer a safety, peace and quiet. Our rules are not rigid, because we want the residents and any visitors to feel as at home as possible here,\" concludes Marx."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact him on 082 801 5399 and visit: www.adlersnest.co.za.","html":"Contact him on 082 801 5399 and visit: www.adlersnest.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Development of retirement complex in full swing
